architecture.truth_contract: Agents propose moves. Training store records events. Derivation decides truth. Graph displays only derived evidence.
notes: Subagents are pedagogical contracts, not autonomous graph mutators.
The orchestrator owns traversal, learner state, event recording, and graph-truth boundaries.
No subagent may write training events, mutate derived state, or produce solidified directly.

agents.name: Route Agent
agents.job: Create a provisional map hypothesis and first reconstruction target.
agents.failure_mode_to_guard: Treating generated route topology as learner evidence.

agents.name: Cold Attempt Agent
agents.job: Elicit the learner's current model before recognition or model-bridge material.
agents.failure_mode_to_guard: Leaking the answer before the learner generates.

agents.name: Delta Agent
agents.job: Find the missing causal process and express it as a mechanism-first repair slot (hinge + in-domain contrast).
agents.failure_mode_to_guard: Naming a vague gap instead of one fillable causal link.

agents.name: Socratic Repair Drill Agent
agents.job: Write one curious in-domain question from hinge_focus and contrast_prompt (sanitized scaffold slots).
agents.failure_mode_to_guard: Quoting tutor/rubric phrasing or revealing the missing mechanism in the drill question.

agents.name: Repair Agent
agents.job: Force own-words reconstruction of the missing link.
agents.failure_mode_to_guard: Counting scaffold echo or circular repair as proof.

agents.name: Model Bridge Agent
agents.job: Reveal compact comparison material only after generation.
agents.failure_mode_to_guard: Turning comparison material into evidence or broad study.

agents.name: Re-Drill Agent
agents.job: Vary spaced reconstruction pressure after spacing is available.
agents.failure_mode_to_guard: Repeating the same wording so the learner can mimic instead of reconstruct.

agents.name: Evidence Judge
agents.job: Classify attempts for the orchestrator without mutating graph truth.
agents.failure_mode_to_guard: Letting an LLM classification override training derivation.
